items.title: B.C. offender arrested after arriving for probation meeting in stolen truck

items.title: Teen shot and buses torched in Manhattan after historic NBA win for Knicks
items.dek: At least 63 people were arrested in the disorder after the Knicks beat the Spurs to clinch the title.
items.body: At least 63 people were arrested in the disorder after the Knicks beat the Spurs to clinch the title.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
items.dek: Nobody was seriously hurt as a result of the accident in the Spanish town, local authorities say.
items.body: Nobody was seriously hurt as a result of the accident in the Spanish town, local authorities say.
